title: handle_google_response duplicates GoogleAdapter transform_response logic
description:
## Severity
Major
## Dimension
dry
## Location
src/pipeline.rs:396-504 vs src/providers/google.rs:164-258
## Violation
handle_google_response reimplements Gemini response parsing already present in GoogleAdapter::transform_response. The candidates/content/parts traversal, functionCall mapping, and usageMetadata extraction are duplicated.
## Mandated refactor
Pipeline should call GoogleAdapter::new().transform_response then convert tool_calls into ToolCall once.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
